_readme: LM Studio preset. Start the local server (default :1234, OpenAI-compatible) and load a model. Env: LLMOPS_MODEL_CONFIG=configs/lmstudio.json LLMOPS_LOCAL_BASE_URL=http://localhost:1234/v1 LLMOPS_LOCAL_MODEL=<the model key shown in LM Studio> LLMOPS_CLASSIFIER_BASE_URL=http://localhost:1234/v1 LLMOPS_CLASSIFIER_MODEL=<same or a smaller model>
